category: 商业生产级信息图-万兴垂直
source: G6 Track D 演化结晶 - 万兴图示(亿图图示)垂直深耕

color_palette.description: 万兴图示默认主题: 蓝#4A90D9主色 + 灰#666666文字 + 白底, 适配亿图图示智能布局算法

typography.description: Microsoft YaHei(主) + SimHei(辅), 适配万兴图示默认字体体系

layout.card_style: rounded rectangle, border-radius 6px, 万兴标准卡片
layout.spacing: optimal auto-spacing, no overlapping nodes, balanced distribution
layout.badges: numbered badges, 万兴标准编号样式
layout.description: 万兴智能布局: 算法自动选择最优布局(层次/正交/放射/环形), 干净自动间距, 无重叠节点

visual_frequency.HF: 模块标题 + 编号 + 主色强调 (万兴标准HF)
visual_frequency.MF: 子主题 + 正文 + 中性色支撑 (万兴标准MF)
visual_frequency.LF: 细节项 + 标注 + 浅色背景 (万兴标准LF)
visual_frequency.progression: 万兴智能布局算法自动优化排版, HF密集前1/3, MF中段, LF底部收束

cognitive_level.reader_profile: 万兴图示用户·非设计师·需要快速生成专业图示
cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 通用知识图示, 适配万兴图示智能布局, 无需设计判断

reader_constraint.reader_state: 快速获取信息·需要清晰结构
reader_constraint.reader_mode: 浏览模式(快速扫描+重点阅读)
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 万兴标准图示 + 智能布局 + 一键生成 + 可编辑模板

prompt_keywords: EdrawMax smart layout, auto-arrangement, algorithm-selected optimal layout, clean auto-spacing, no overlapping nodes, balanced distribution, professional EdrawMax aesthetic, Microsoft YaHei typography, optimal for static export, wondershare-diagram compatible
negative_keywords: 3D render, shadows, gradients, photorealistic, complex textures, dark background, handwritten, sketch, watercolor, overlapping, cluttered
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 万兴智能布局图示
✅ 必须: 万兴图示智能布局算法 + 自动间距 + 无重叠节点 + 平衡分布 + Microsoft YaHei字体 + 静态导出优化
❌ 禁止: 3D渲染 + 阴影 + 渐变 + 写实照片 + 动态参数 + 复杂特效
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: EdrawMax smart layout ONLY. Algorithm-selected optimal layout with auto-spacing, no overlapping nodes, balanced distribution. Microsoft YaHei typography. Optimized for static export. NO 3D, NO shadows, NO dynamic parameters.
meta_prompt: EdrawMax smart layout diagram, auto-arrangement, algorithm-selected optimal layout, clean auto-spacing, no overlapping nodes, balanced distribution, professional EdrawMax aesthetic, Microsoft YaHei typography, blue #4A90D9 primary, white background, optimal for static export, wondershare-diagram compatible
prompt_example: Smart layout diagram, EdrawMax auto-arrangement, algorithm-selected optimal layout based on content structure, clean auto-spacing with no overlapping nodes, balanced distribution, professional EdrawMax aesthetic, Microsoft YaHei typography (title 20pt bold, body 14pt), blue #4A90D9 primary color, gray #666666 text, white #FFFFFF background with light blue #E8F0FC accents, numbered badges, optimal for static export. --ar 4:3 --s 200 --style raw --tool edrawmax --layout auto
reference_source: G6 Track D演化结晶 - 万兴图示(亿图图示)垂直深耕, 适配万兴市场发布
